quotes.verbatim_quote: (*) Lower the sixth string to D
quotes.why_load_bearing: Direct performance instruction altering instrument tuning, prerequisite for pedal-point exercises.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Pedal Point on D, the V of Gmaj.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Labels the harmonic function of D as the fifth degree of G major.

quotes.topic: Pedal point added vs prior example
quotes.verbatim_quote:
(*) This introduction was taken from Jazz Guitar $1, Ex. 1 in Lesson No.20. The only difference is
that here Pedal Point is added.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Isolates the single variable being taught — addition of pedal point — making pedagogical intent explicit.
